case_title: DAVID GRISWOLD VS. AMERICAN AIRLINES, INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GRISWOLD, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMERICAN AIRLINES, INC. $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $340.00, MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED.
